title: Rich German Carrot Soup
description: Peppery velvety carrot soup with a mother sauce base, finished with orange zest and gluten-free, perfect for a show‑off German dish.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot and sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Add the chopped carrots and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for another minute to caramelize.
Pour in the carrot broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes until carrots are tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth and velvety.
Season with apple cider vinegar, salt, pepper, and fresh dill, stirring well.
Add orange zest, adjust seasoning to taste, and reheat gently for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a swirl of cream or a sprig of dill.
Enjoy the rich, peppery flavors of this German carrot soup.
